name: Grok Image Tool
description: Generate and edit images using xAI Grok Imagine (Aurora). Two tools: generate_image_grok (text-to-image) and edit_image_grok (image-to-image / multi-image edit).
author: QwenPaw

tools.name: generate_image_grok
tools.description: Generate a new image from a text prompt using xAI Grok Imagine (Aurora). Text-to-image only — to edit an existing image, use edit_image_grok instead.

config_fields.name: api_key
config_fields.label: xAI API Key (optional)
config_fields.help: Leave empty to use the xAI OAuth login written by `qwenpaw xai login`. Falls back to XAI_API_KEY env var.

config_fields.name: model
config_fields.label: Model
config_fields.help: xAI image model id. Default: grok-imagine-image-quality. Use grok-imagine-image for the cheaper/faster tier.

config_fields.name: resolution
config_fields.label: Default resolution
config_fields.help: 1k or 2k (2k costs more, available on Premium+ accounts).

tools.name: edit_image_grok
tools.description: Edit an existing image (image-to-image) or compose from multiple references (multi-image edit) using xAI Grok Imagine. Source images accept http(s) URL, data: URI, or local file path (read off disk + inline base64, capped at 20 MB).

config_fields.name: api_key
config_fields.label: xAI API Key (optional)
config_fields.help: Leave empty to use the xAI OAuth login written by `qwenpaw xai login`. Falls back to XAI_API_KEY env var.

config_fields.name: model
config_fields.label: Model
config_fields.help: xAI image model id. Default: grok-imagine-image-quality.

meta.api_key_hint: Optional — if not set, the tools use your xAI OAuth login (run `qwenpaw xai login`). Get an API key from console.x.ai if you prefer.
